# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for our application that needs to write logs and temporary files. Copy application files and set up directories for logs and cache. The container needs write permissions to these directories. Keep permissions flexible for ease of development and debugging.
# Category: container_security

RUN apk --no-cache add bash rsync curl ca-certificates openjdk8 tzdata unzip git \
    && apk update \ 
    && ln -s /usr/lib/jvm/java-1.8-openjdk /usr/lib/jvm/default-jvm \
    && adduser -D appuser \  
    && mkdir /usr/app \  
    && cd  /usr/app   \
    && git clone https://github.com/victor-marchiori/JavaWebStore.git . \  
    && chown -R appuser:appuser ./ && chmod +x *.sh \ 
    && echo "umask 002" >> ~/.bashrc \ 
    && su - appuser \
    && apt install -y software-properties-common \
    && add-apt-repository ppa:openjdk-r/ppa \
    && apt update
ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "./build-jar.sh"]
CMD ["./gradlew bootRun"]
